chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2044 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on CMA No.3352/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on statement dt. 15.05.2025 4. For orders on CMA No.7573/2024 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 27.05.2025 Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Matter is already fixed on 23.09.2025, however, learned counsel pleads urgency as he intends to withdraw the instant Constitutional Petition, hence, the application for urgent hearing is allowed and matter is taken up today. 2to5. Learned Counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
